prestazioni: Engine swap to 1VD-FTV (4.5L V8 twin-turbo diesel) with upgraded BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbochargers (1.05 A/R, 62mm inducer) and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping from TurboSmart, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and boost mapping (targeting 35 psi peak boost and 450 hp at the wheels).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: R&D Sport 4340 chromoly front and rear driveshafts, ARB RD120 differential covers with 3.90:1 gear ratios, and a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the rear axle to handle increased torque (800 Nm+).

Suspension overhaul with King Shocks 2.5-inch Remote Reservoir Coilovers (14-inch travel, 300 psi nitrogen charge) and Old Man Emu BP-51 bypass shocks for extreme articulation, paired with Polyurethane Bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0119K) to eliminate flex in the 70 Series chassis.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a TJM Pro Locker fender flares kit (extended 3 inches per side) with trimmed inner fenders and seam-welded reinforcement plates, finished in a matte military green (Pantone 5743 C) with clear powder-coated accents.

Front bumper replacement with a ARB Deluxe Bull Bar (winch-ready, 9500 lb capacity) integrated with Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light pods (50-inch dual-row, 40-degree spot beam) and a custom aluminum skid plate (6mm thick, CNC-machined for the 1VD-FTV oil pan).

Rear cargo area transformation into a full overland setup: Rhino-Rack Pioneer Platform (2100mm x 1300mm) with a custom aluminum drawer system (400 kg load capacity) from Alu-Cab, paired with a 270-degree awning (Eezi-Awn K9) and a dual-battery system (Optima YellowTop D31T) for auxiliary power.
